tasks.title: Scaffold frontend Next.js app
exit_criteria: Frontend project exists under frontend/.
App uses src/app routing.
TypeScript strict mode is enabled.
Local dev server can start.
No obligation feature UI is implemented in this task.

tasks.title: Initialize shadcn/ui and base UI primitives
exit_criteria: Install only shadcn primitives used by implemented screens and flows: Button, Input, Select, Table, Card, Badge, Dialog or AlertDialog, Field/Form primitives, Alert, Empty, Skeleton, DropdownMenu only if row actions require it, and Separator only where visually needed.
shadcn info works from frontend/.
No unused shadcn primitives, placeholder components, or raw custom replacements for existing shadcn primitives are introduced.
Font and Tailwind/shadcn setup avoids circular theme font references.

tasks.title: Implement Obsidian & Copper Ledger theme tokens
exit_criteria: Dark palette uses #11100E, #1A1713, #231F19, #3A3026, #F4EFE7, #A99F91, #C46A35, and #E07A3F.
Light palette uses #F7F1E8, #FFFDF9, #F0E6D8, #DED0BD, #211B15, #7B6D5F, #C46A35, and #A9542A.
Status semantics exist for overdue, due soon, done, in progress, submitted, and pending.
No blue-purple gradients or crypto-style neon palette is introduced.

tasks.title: Create typed API client and DTO contracts
exit_criteria: DTOs match backend/docs/openapi.json and backend/app/api/schemas.py.
No any is used.
Read DTOs do not contain raw companyTaxId.
Known backend error codes are preserved and not swallowed.
BACKEND_API_BASE_URL is read server-side.

tasks.title: Create i18n dictionaries and locale routing helpers
exit_criteria: English and Spanish labels exist for navigation, KPIs, filters, statuses, types, errors, forms, buttons, empty states, and audit labels.
Raw enum strings are not intended as primary user-facing labels.
Invalid locale behavior is defined.

tasks.title: Create route structure and shared app shell
exit_criteria: / redirects to default locale.
/en and /es routes are supported.
App shell includes only navigation/actions needed for dashboard, create, detail, and edit flows.
Locale routing is supported; a locale switcher is included only if it is fully wired to /en and /es routes.
No placeholder controls, dead buttons, decorative actions, or unused navigation items are introduced.
Route states use localized copy.

tasks.title: Implement dashboard data derivation and filters
exit_criteria: KPIs include total count, counts by backend status, overdue count from backend isOverdue, and due-soon count from backend isDueSoon.
No frontend date arithmetic decides compliance risk.
Status/type/due filters use constrained values.
Title/owner query uses free text.
KPI and filter behavior is ready for the consolidated test task.

tasks.title: Build dashboard route and widgets
exit_criteria: Dashboard satisfies AC01 through AC05.
Dashboard renders total, by-status, overdue, and due-soon KPIs.
Rows are ordered by dueDate.
Overdue and due-soon visual treatment uses backend flags and semantic tokens.
Empty state distinguishes no obligations from no filter matches.
Dashboard reflects API loading and API error states with localized copy.
Dashboard renders correctly in en and es.

tasks.title: Build obligation detail read-only panels
exit_criteria: Detail satisfies AC06 through AC10 and AC21.

All backend display fields required by the challenge are visible: title, description, type, status, dueDate, owner, requiresDocument, hasDocument, companyTaxIdMasked, document metadata when present, availableTransitions, submitBlockedReason, version, and auditHistory.
companyTaxIdMasked is displayed and raw companyTaxId is never displayed.
Audit history is read-only.
Available transitions are displayed from backend data only.
When submitBlockedReason indicates missing document, the submitted action is shown disabled/blocked with a localized backend-driven explanation.
Detail page reflects API loading, not-found, and API error states with localized copy.

tasks.title: Build create obligation flow
exit_criteria: Create satisfies AC11 through AC13.
Create form does not expose status, version, or expectedVersion.
Basic UX validation exists for required fields and obvious invalid values.
Backend VALIDATION_ERROR is shown clearly.
Create submission shows pending/loading state and reflects API errors with localized copy.
Successful create navigates to or renders returned detail using masked tax id.

tasks.title: Build edit obligation flow
exit_criteria: Edit satisfies AC14 and AC15.
Edit form includes expectedVersion but does not expose workflow status.
Backend validation and conflict errors are shown clearly.
Edit submission shows pending/loading state and reflects API errors with localized copy.
Successful edit refreshes returned obligation version.

tasks.title: Build status transition actions
exit_criteria: Status flow satisfies AC18 through AC20.
Only backend availableTransitions are rendered as actions.
A submitted action is never enabled unless submitted is present in backend availableTransitions.
If backend returns submitBlockedReason for submitted, the UI renders submitted as blocked/disabled instead of inventing transition logic.
expectedVersion is submitted.
DOCUMENT_REQUIRED_FOR_SUBMISSION, INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION, and OBLIGATION_VERSION_CONFLICT produce distinct user feedback.
Duplicate submissions are prevented while pending.

tasks.title: Build document metadata actions
exit_criteria: Document flow satisfies AC16 and AC17.
sizeBytes must be positive.
storageKey can be omitted.
expectedVersion is submitted for attach/remove.
Attach/remove actions show pending state and reflect API errors with localized copy.
Removal requires explicit confirmation.

tasks.title: Build guarded delete obligation action
exit_criteria: Delete satisfies AC22.
Delete requires explicit confirmation.
Delete action shows pending state and reflects API errors with localized copy.
Successful delete returns user to a coherent dashboard state.
Not-found delete recovery is clear.

tasks.title: Add frontend tests for critical behavior
outputs: At least one frontend flow test
exit_criteria: Tests cover KPI/filter behavior.
Tests verify create/edit forms do not expose workflow status.
Tests verify masked tax id display only.
Tests verify availableTransitions drive status actions.
Tests verify submitted is blocked/disabled from backend submitBlockedReason when a required document is missing.
Tests verify conflict feedback.
Tests verify API loading or error state is reflected in dashboard or detail UI.
Tests verify en/es labels for at least dashboard and status labels.
At least one frontend flow test exists.

tasks.title: Run quality pass and document frontend setup
exit_criteria: README explains how to run backend plus frontend.
TypeScript typecheck passes.
ESLint passes.
Frontend tests pass.
Browser smoke verifies the required surfaces only: dashboard, detail, create, edit, status mutation, API loading/error, en/es labels, and light/dark rendering from the approved theme.
Final UI contains no unused buttons, placeholder controls, decorative-only actions, or unimplemented menu items.
No unrelated files are changed.

parallel_execution_batches.reason: Scaffold, shadcn setup, and theme tokens touch foundational files and should happen in order.
API contracts and i18n dictionaries are independent after scaffold exists.
Route shell depends on theme and locale helpers.
Dashboard derivation, detail read UI, create flow, and edit flow can be built against shared API/i18n without writing the same files if module boundaries are respected.
Dashboard route composes the filter/KPI work from T07.
Status, document, and delete actions can be implemented independently after detail panels exist.
Tests and final documentation depend on implemented flows.

approval_gate.required_user_action: Approve this todos.json before implementation begins.
approval_gate.next_step_after_approval: Create frontend/ and implement tasks according to dependency order.
must_not_do_before_approval: Do not create the frontend application folder.
